creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/firewalls-ipfw.html
section 29.4.2. IPFW Rule Syntax
paragraph LOG_AMOUNT
says that the command to reset the ipfw log is "ipfw reset log"

The response is as below.
> ipfw: DEPRECATED: 'reset' matched 'resetlog' as a sub-string
> ipfw: invalid rule number ``log''

"ipfw resetlog" works with the response
> Logging counts reset.

Of course this is just a super-minor item.
